hooks.command: file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|astro)$'; then lint_out=$(npx eslint "$file" 2>&1); lint_exit=$?; check_out=$(npx astro check 2>&1); check_exit=$?; if [ $lint_exit -ne 0 ] || [ $check_exit -ne 0 ]; then echo "$lint_out"; echo "$check_out"; exit 2; fi; fi
hooks.rewakeMessage: Lint or typecheck failed after your edit:
